nasb.text: “For thus says the Lord God, ‘Bring up a company against them and give them over to terror and plunder.

esv.text: For thus says the Lord God: “Bring up a vast host against them, and make them an object of terror and a plunder.

cnv.text: “因為主耶和華這樣說：我必使一大群人上來攻擊她們，使她們驚慌，被人搶掠。

ccb.text: “主耶和华说，‘我要使许多人起来攻击、抢掠她们，叫她们胆战心惊。
